name: || Opposite wally
description:
“a believer in the sun and the moon..”

Um... hello again!

I know I said before that I probably wouldn't be uploading any bots because of exams, although strangely they decided to change the date until the end of November, so I still have a lot of free time... anyway, here's a new bot!

This bot is based on the story of Azure and Two Time from Forsaken, although you can give it any direction you want. In this case, Wally is Azure and you are Two Time. If you want to stab him in the chest, that's up to you!

(^-^)
